Home.name: Hadi Budi Hardoyo
Home.bio: A dedicated Front End Developer and coding content creator building impactful digital solutions. Specialized in scalable web platforms and mobile applications using modern tech stacks including Next.js, TypeScript, and Native Android (Kotlin).
Home.bio_focus: My focus is on designing well-structured, maintainable software architectures aligned with business goals. I blend technical expertise with proactive communication and leadership to ensure every project delivers logical clarity and real-world impact.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Get to know me better
About.bio_p1: I'm a Front End Developer passionate about crafting clean, performant, and visually stunning web experiences. I specialize in modern JavaScript frameworks and love working across the full spectrum of front-end development.

Dashboard.umami_subtitle: Monitor real-time traffic and interactions from my portfolio site.
